title: lefebvrea stenosperma
intro: Lefebvrea stenosperma, also known as the African tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lefebvrea stenosperma include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Lefebvrea stenosperma can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed as a herbal remedy to promote overall health and well-being.
